headline: RVMD Stock Rises on Detailed Results From Pancreatic Cancer Study
summary: Revolution Medicines jumps after detailed phase III data show daraxonrasib cuts death risk by 60% and doubles median survival in treated pancreatic cancer.

headline: Bristol Myers Squibb Wins EU Green Light for Opdivo-Based Hodgkin Lymphoma Treatment (BMY)
summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) has secured approval from the European Commission for the use of Opdivo (nivolumab) in combination with doxorubicin, vinblastine and dacarbazine (AVD) as a first-line treatment for adults and adolescents aged 12 years and older with previously untreated Stage III or Stage IV classical Hodgkin lymphoma. The decision introduces the first immunotherapy-based treatment regimen approved in the European Union for patients newly diagnosed with advanced classical Hodgkin

The decision introduces the first immunotherapy-based treatment regimen approved in the European Union for patients newly diagnosed with advanced classical Hodgkin
